images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful early‑20s Japanese idol‑style model, flawless yet realistic skin with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes that catch the soft ring‑light in a subtle 環形燈眼神光, a cute yet seductive face crowned with straight black silky hair. She wears a form‑fitting Japanese school swimsuit (日系死庫水泳裝) made of glossy nylon that hugs her slim waist and ample bust, the high‑cut design accentuating her curves. The scene is set in a luxurious hotel room (高級飯店房間) backdrop imagined as a pastel‑tinted fairy‑tale forest with gentle bokeh of delicate blossoms and subtle mist, evoking a Zen and peaceful mood (禪意平靜). Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, the shallow depth of field and vibrant, high‑saturation color grading (高飽和鮮豔色調) render her the sole focal point.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑type model posing inside a subway car. She wears a sleek, flowing trench coat draped open over a delicate lace bralette and high‑waist brief set, the coat’s warm cashmere‑beige contrasting with a dark, moody green color grade. Soft natural daylight streams through the carriage’s windows, creating a bright yet subdued illumination that highlights the sheen of her flawless, pored skin and the subtle sheen of the silk lining. She leans against a polished metal hand‑rail, one hand gently tugging the lapel, her eyes lock directly into the lens with a flirtatious, seductive smile while a faint blush colors her cheeks. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field renders the interior graffiti and distant commuters into creamy bokeh,Ray tracing and global illumination render realistic light bounce and reflections on the glossy floor and metal surfaces. The composition captures intimate fashion tension, a modern urban erotic mood, and a moment of candid interaction with her fans.8k photo, Large breasts
